first_patient_message: Hello, I am at the clinic location but I can't find an accessibility option
goal: Figure out how to get to the clinic
location: first floor of a building with no elevator
scenario_instructions: You have an appointment today but can't seem to enter the clinic
You are sure you are at the correct place, but you actually aren't
You know its located on the second floor but there is no elevator
Confirm there is an accessibility option once
Ask or answer questions that would obviously give the hint that you aren't at the correct location
Realize you are at the incorrect location after receiving sufficient evidence, you are actually at 4321 Injury Plaza
For this scenario, don't accept the agent redirecting the call elsewhere

final_response: No, thank you I'll be there shortly!
